summary:
An IQ range of 90–109 represents average intellectual functioning, falling within one standard deviation above and below the mean (100) in the standard normal distribution. This classification is supported by mainstream psychological standards including those outlined in the DSM-5.  

Final Answer: \boxed{B} The correct choice reflecting this established normative value is B. 

Note: Final answer must be boxed only once at end.
